description: Active promotions. Check occasion and services booked to apply the right deal. Always show the saving to the customer.

Christmas_Week.message: Book Hair Coloring + Facial together this Christmas week and save 10%.

Birthday_Party.message: Celebrating your birthday? Get 10% off our signature glow package.
